results.title: Iowa confirms first case of measles in 2026 in Des Moines area
results.description: Iowa's first case of measles this year was confirmed on Wednesday, according to the Iowa Department of Health and Human Services.

results.title: Trial delayed for man accused of killing Arizona ballet dancer
results.description: A Valley man accused of shooting and killing his ballerina wife in 2022 will not go to trial this month.

results.title: Russia carries out more than 167,000 attacks on civilian sites in Ukraine since start of war – SSU
results.description: Russia has carried out more than 167,000 attacks on civilian infrastructure and other civilian sites in Ukraine since the beginning of its full-scale invasion.

results.title: Another Prichard officer charged
results.description: A second Prichard police officer has been arrested in connection to an ongoing criminal investigation of former officer Emanuel Naman Dotch.

results.title: Family of Massachusetts man who died in Fiji struggled to get medical evacuation
results.description: Scott Winslow of Holbrook, Massachusetts was sailing near Fiji when he fell critically ill and died weeks later. WBZ-TV's Mike Sullivan reports.

results.title: Victims of 23andMe data breach to get $47m payout, judge rules
results.description: Victims of a 2023 data hack at genetics testing company 23andMe are set to receive a multi-million-dollar payout from the firm.
